title: The Chemicals in Your Child's Blood Are Quietly Stealing Their Bones
description: PFAS — the 'forever chemicals' in drinking water, food packaging, and cookware — are detectable in 97% of Americans. New research links early-life exposure to measurably weaker bones in adolescents, during the exact developmental window when peak bone mass is set for life. A 10% deficit at peak bone mass roughly doubles fracture risk in old age. The damage may already be done.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Chemicals in Your Child's Blood Are Quietly Stealing Their Bones
